name: Dynamic Particle Fountain
description: Continuously spawns particles that fall and are eventually removed, demonstrating dynamic object management.

jsLoop.code: function jsLoop(ctx, state) { state = state || { count: 0, particleIds: [] }; var add = []; var removeIds = []; if (state.particleIds.length < 50) { var id = 'p_' + state.count++; var vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4; var vz = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4; var vy = 8 + Math.random() * 4; add.push({ id: id, type: 'Sphere', radius: 0.2, position: [0, 1, 0], velocity: [vx, vy, vz], mass: 1, color: '#e74c3c' }); state.particleIds.push(id); } var currentObjs = ctx.scene.objects || []; for (var i = 0; i < state.particleIds.length; i++) { var pid = state.particleIds[i]; var obj = currentObjs.find(function(o){ return o.id === pid; }); if (obj && obj.position && obj.position[1] < -5) { removeIds.push(pid); state.particleIds.splice(i, 1); i--; } } return { state: state, addObjects: add, removeObjectIds: removeIds }; }
